scripts.sim:full: docker compose --profile dev up -d --build && rm -rf ./eval-artifacts && mkdir -p ./eval-artifacts && docker compose --profile dev run --rm --no-deps -v "$PWD/eval-artifacts:/tmp/eval-artifacts" worker-dev sh -lc 'export PATH=/usr/local/go/bin:/go/bin:$PATH && cd /app/services/server && go test ./... && go run ./cmd/eval --seed 42 --batch-size 20 --agent all --output /tmp/eval-artifacts'
scripts.start:backend: cd services/server && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go run main.go -ldflags "-X lyznflow/internal/constants.Version=$(git describe --tags --always --dirty)"
